transaction.title: transaction
transaction.description: Realtime stream of user transaction updates.

amount.description: It is the amount of transaction performed.

date_expiry.description: Epoch value of the expiry time of the contract. Please note that in case of buy transaction this is approximate value not exact one.

id.description: A per-connection unique identifier. Can be passed to the `forget` API call to unsubscribe.

purchase_time.description: Time at which contract was purchased, present only for sell transaction

transaction_id.description: It is the transaction ID. Every contract (buy or sell) or payment has a unique ID.

transaction_time.description: Time at which transaction was performed: for buy it is purchase time, for sell it is sell time.

id.description: A per-connection unique identifier. Can be passed to the `forget` API call to unsubscribe.

msg_type.description: Action name of the request made.

req_id.description: Optional field sent in request to map to response, present only when request contains `req_id`.
